entry.title: Magrada Firming Algae Body Serum With Plant Extracts, 35% 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Body Serum
Price: 27.90

The Lifting Complex is designed to fight against cellulite! The serum is suitable for daily use and contains the power of botanic ingredients, which help to make the skin firm, supple, and bright. The concentrated serum contains cornflower water and bog cranberry extract, known for its high vitamin C content. The product also contains horse chestnut and ginkgo tree extracts, which effectively fight cellulite. The rockweed extract contains rich amounts of sea minerals, has a moisturising effect, and helps to remove residues from the body. Although the serum with a light composition is absorbed quickly, the moisturized feeling remains on the skin for a long time.

  • Organic cornflower water acts as a blood supply activator. In addition, it has toning and complexion brightening properties, resulting in dewy and rested looking skin.
  • Organic horse chestnut extract has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The extract helps fight cellulite effectively by improving skin circulation.
  • Organic cranberry extract has skin tightening properties. Antioxidants and salicylic acid in cranberry give the skin youthfulness and radiance.
  • Ginkgo (leaf) extract has a rejuvenating effect on the skin. It helps reduce cellulite and soothe irritated skin.
  • Rockweed extract stimulates the turnover of skin cells, improving the overall look of the skin.

How to use: Apply the serum twice a day (in the morning and evening) on problematic areas: arms, belly, hips, buttocks, thighs, and knees. For a more powerful and longer-lasting effect, combine the serum with the anti-cellulite cream of the same line. It is recommended to use the product in the form of a treatment course.

Ingredients: Centaurea Cyanus (Cornflower) Flower Water*, Aqua, Glycerin, Polysorbate 20, Alcohol, Aesculus Hippocastanum (Horse Chestnut) Seed Extract*, Xanthan Gum, Vaccinium Macrocarpon (Cranberry) Fruit Extract*, Ginkgo Biloba (Maidenhair Tree) Leaf Extract, Fucus Vesiculosus (Bladderwrack) Extract, Parfum (Natural), Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate

*COSMOS Organic Certified Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 96%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Firming Algae Body Mask With Therapeutic Mud 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Body Mask
Price: 30.90

The ancient force and power of the sea are combined in Magrada’s firming body mask. The unique therapeutic mud and peat mixture with cranberry extract is an efficient force in the battle against cellulite. The mixture of sea minerals and humins is a living system, which improves the breakdown of fats and the excretion of residues and invigorates metabolism. High organic, slightly exfoliating mud has a warming effect and significantly increases the supply of moisture to the skin, keeping it elastic.

  • The patented mixture of medicinal mud and peat contains bioactive compounds that have an anti-inflammatory effect. The active ingredients of medicinal mud have anti-aging effects and a whole spectrum of antioxidant properties.
  • Shea butter is extracted from the seeds of the shea tree, which grows natively in Africa. Shea butter deeply softens and moisturizes the skin, helping to maintain its moisture balance.
  • Organic cranberry extract has skin tightening properties. Antioxidants and salicylic acid in cranberry give the skin youthfulness and radiance.

How to use: Apply the mask evenly on clean skin and leave on the skin for 20 minutes. For intensive conditioning, the mask may be covered with a layer of film. Finally, rinse your skin with warm water and finish the procedure with a serum and body cream from the same line. It is recommended to use the body mask as a course of treatment, 1–2 times per week. Keep closed at room temperature. Protect from direct sunlight.

Ingredients: Maris Limus (Peloid), Peat, Glycerin, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter*, Aqua, Vaccinium Macrocarpon (Cranberry) Fruit Extract*, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 99,38%. The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | alcohol-free | vegan | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Golden Body Shimmer With Carrot Extract 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Body Serum
Price: 23.30

Get a golden glow in seconds! You are looking at your new go-to product for achieving radiant skin. The oil-free gel absorbs in seconds and gives the skin a golden radiance.

Natural minerals (golden and bronze) and extracts from St. John’s wort, carrot, and aloe leave the skin radiant and moisturised to perfection. The scent of the gel is inspired by the freshness of the sea and the gentle summer wind. The several-good-things-in-one product absorbs fast and has a light consistency, leaving the skin pleasantly silky. The glow effect is perfect for important events as well as a sunny summer day.

  • A wonderful plant with medicinal properties called St. John’s wort calms irritation. St. John’s wort extract is perfect for sensitive skin and has a cleansing and anti-microbial effect.
  • Carrot root extract helps to achieve a great tan and makes it last longer.
  • Aloe extract promotes the healing of wounds, moisturises, has refreshing and anti-inflammatory properties, is calming, alleviates irritation, and protects the skin.

How to use: Using the shimmer gel is super easy: gently apply the product to clean skin. Don’t worry – it won’t stain your clothes. You can use the gel on the body, décolletage and face. The glow is perfect for evening events and sunny weather.

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Xanthan Gum, Daucus Carota Sativa (Carrot) Root Extract, Hypericum Perforatum Extract, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Extract, Panthenol, Parfum, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, Mica, CI 77891, CI 77491.

Ingredients of natural origin: 95,89%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: HOIA Body Cocktail Body Glam 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Body Serum
Price: 18.90

Body Glam is designed for women who want it all! It will leave your skin hydrated, silky soft and gives your skin a nice suntouched shimmering glow. This body cocktail is based on organic apple, hibiscus and watermelon hydrosols. The product has a natural fruity smell and it pampers your skin with botanical vitamins, phytosterols, minerals and antioxidants. It is enriched with a bioactive cocktail of hyaluronic acid, wild algae and aloe. Our body cocktail effectively hydrates all outer skin layers, smoothes out fine lines and leaves your skin soft. Shimmering particles in the product are of mineral origin which do not pollute environment.

How to use: Apply on skin, massage until absorbed and enjoy your beautifully glowing skin.

Ingredients: *Pyrus Malus Fruit Water, *Citrullus Vulgaris Fruit Water, *Hibiscus Rosa-Sinensis Flower Water, *Glycerin, Aqua, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, Furcellaria Lumbricalis Extract, Xanthan Gum, Mica, Iron Oxide, Citric Acid. *From organic farming.

Handmade in Saaremaa
